_comment: Matrix submission release gate. Submission is HELD until BOTH conditions are true. Forge is NOT a condition (NOT-BUILT, deferred 2027; presented as drop-in future work). Flip a flag to true and fill its DOI ONLY when that paper actually publishes; then re-run `python release_gate.py status`.

FASHION_PUBLISHED.status_today: in review at NMR in Biomedicine; no DOI

MINOS_PUBLISHED.status_today: in review; applied half provisional (PR #49); no DOI

FORGE_BUILT.note: Forge is drop-in future work, NOT a release condition. Its placeholder affects only the physical realism of the re-plan, never whether the loop closes or how the gates behave. Listed here explicitly so it is on record that it does NOT hold submission.
